name: The Ancients
description:
Infiltrating Dark Enchantress Cookie's castle

꧁⎝ 𓆩༺✧༻𓆪 ⎠꧂

Okay bear with me, I actually made this one using my own imagination instead of recreation from our new reading app: c.ai. No, it's not canon. It was an old idea I had months ago that I forgot about.

Anyway this is an au with the other Awakened Ancients where you're White Lily Cookie and tailing them w/out them knowing. Have fun lmao, I'll add comedy, angst and comfort in the tags if that'sthe direction ya wanna go.
creator: Prettydecay
